comment: EmulatR DS10 platform device manifest. PCI vendor/device/class and BAR sizes are _PROVISIONAL pending a real hardware dump. Strict JSON: no // or /* */ comments -- use comment fields.

pci_devices.name: cypress_ide
pci_devices.comment: Cypress 82C693 IDE func1. Named model (Cy82C693Ide) owns its config space and fixed legacy ports (pri cmd 0x1F0/ctrl 0x3F6, sec cmd 0x170/ctrl 0x376), so no relocatable BARs here. class_code/prog-IF _PROVISIONAL: model emits legacy prog-IF 0x00 (trace-confirmed); real silicon may be 0x80 (programmable native/legacy).

storage.comment: primary master = dqa0, bootable ATA fixed disk. media = bare image FILENAME resolved against [Storage] diskDir in EmulatrV4.ini (absolute path used as-is; empty = no disk). Raw flat image, 512-byte sectors, byte offset = LBA*512.
primary slave = dqa1, ATAPI CD. media empty = no disc loaded.
